success_factors: Workflow completed end-to-end with status=success across all planned nodes (download, analysis, env, generate, run, review, finalize).
Low intrusiveness risk and high import feasibility (0.93) enabled adapter_mode=import instead of more fragile black-box wrapping.
Generated MCP service started healthy over stdio transport and passed MCP plugin validation.
Repository structure and AST-discovered symbols provided sufficient metadata for automated endpoint generation.
failure_reasons: Original project test status is marked failed/unknown with empty details and zero execution time, indicating test phase likely not executed rather than functional regression.
DeepWiki analysis failed, reducing enrichment quality for architecture/context decisions.
